get.description:
STORY-248 AC10: Filter rejection statistics.

Returns counts of each rejection reason code for the specified period.
Admin-only endpoint.

Reason codes:
- keyword_miss: No sector keyword found in procurement description
- exclusion_hit: Exclusion keyword matched (false-positive prevention)
- llm_reject: LLM arbiter rejected the contract
- density_low: Term density below minimum threshold
- value_exceed: Contract value exceeds sector maximum
- uf_mismatch: State (UF) not in selected set
- status_mismatch: Procurement status does not match filter

parameters.name: days

schema.description: Number of days to look back
schema.title: Days

parameters.description: Number of days to look back

get.description:
B-05 AC3: Return aggregated cache metrics for admin dashboard.

Response includes hit_rate_24h, miss_rate_24h, stale_served_24h,
total_entries, priority_distribution, age_distribution, degraded_keys,
avg_fetch_duration_ms, and top_keys.

B-05 AC7: Return full details of a specific cache entry.

Response includes search_params, results_count, sources, fetched_at,
priority, fail_streak, degraded_until, coverage, access_count,
last_accessed_at, age_hours, cache_status.

delete.description:
B-05 AC5: Invalidate a specific cache entry across all levels.

Deletes from Supabase, Redis/InMemory, and local file.
Returns {"deleted_levels": ["supabase", "redis", "local"]}.

B-05 AC6: Invalidate ALL cache entries (nuclear option).

Requires X-Confirm: delete-all header for safety.
Without header, returns 400 Bad Request.

get.description:

post.description:

post.description:
Update subscription billing period (monthly / semiannual / annual).

GTM-002: Simplified flow — Stripe handles proration automatically.
No deferral logic, no manual credit calculations.

Cancel subscription at period end.

UX-308: Accepts optional cancellation reason for retention analytics.
Sets cancel_at_period_end=True in Stripe, updates status to 'canceling'.

Submit post-cancellation feedback (UX-308 AC6).

Logs feedback as a user action for analytics. Fire-and-forget — never blocks UX.

get.description:
Get current user's enabled features.

CACHING STRATEGY (STORY-217: unified pool):
- Redis cache with 5-minute TTL via shared pool
- Cache key: ``features:{user_id}``
- Cache miss: Fetch from Supabase (JOIN user_subscriptions + plan_features)
- Graceful degradation via InMemoryCache fallback

get.description:
Initiate Google OAuth 2.0 flow.

Redirects user to Google consent screen to authorize Google Sheets access.

Query Parameters:
    redirect: Frontend path to return to after authorization

Returns:
    302 Redirect to Google OAuth consent screen

Security:
    - CSRF protection via state parameter
    - State encodes user_id + redirect path
    - Validates state on callback

Example:
    GET /api/auth/google?redirect=/buscar
    → Redirects to https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/auth?...

parameters.name: redirect

schema.description: Page to return to after auth
schema.title: Redirect

parameters.description: Page to return to after auth

delete.description:
Revoke Google OAuth access and delete tokens.

Deletes user's OAuth tokens from database and revokes access with Google.

Returns:
    {
        "success": true,
        "message": "Google Sheets access revoked successfully"
    }

Security:
    - Requires authentication
    - Only deletes tokens for authenticated user
    - Revokes with Google API (best effort)

Note:
    Revoking access does NOT delete existing spreadsheets.
    Spreadsheets remain in user's Google Drive.

get.description:
Handle OAuth callback from Google.

This endpoint is called by Google after user authorizes access.

Query Parameters:
    code: Authorization code (exchanged for tokens), absent on error
    state: CSRF state token (contains user_id + redirect path)
    error: OAuth error code (if authorization failed)

Returns:
    302 Redirect to frontend with success/error status

Flow:
    1. Decode state param to get user_id and redirect path
    2. Exchange code for tokens (access + refresh)
    3. Encrypt and save tokens to database
    4. Redirect to frontend with success flag

Error Handling:
    - Invalid state → Redirect with error=invalid_state
    - Code exchange failed → Redirect with error=oauth_failed
    - Database error → Redirect with error=storage_failed

post.description:
Export search results to Google Sheets.

Creates a new Google Sheets spreadsheet or updates an existing one
with search results. Applies professional formatting (green header,
currency symbols, hyperlinks).

Request Body:
    {
        "licitacoes": [...],
        "title": "SmartLic - Uniformes - 09/02/2026",
        "mode": "create" | "update",
        "spreadsheet_id": "optional for update mode"
    }

Returns:
    {
        "success": true,
        "spreadsheet_id": "...",
        "spreadsheet_url": "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/...",
        "total_rows": 142,
        "updated_at": "2026-02-09T15:30:00Z"  // only for update mode
    }

Errors:
    401 Unauthorized: User hasn't authorized Google Sheets
    403 Forbidden: Token revoked or insufficient permissions
    429 Too Many Requests: Google API quota exceeded
    500 Internal Server Error: Google API error

Example:
    POST /api/export/google-sheets
    {
        "licitacoes": [...],
        "title": "SmartLic - Uniformes - SP, RJ",
        "mode": "create"
    }

get.description:
Get user's Google Sheets export history.

Returns list of all exports with spreadsheet URLs and search parameters.
Useful for "re-open last export" and usage analytics.

Query Parameters:
    limit: Maximum number of exports to return (default: 50, max: 100)

Returns:
    {
        "exports": [
            {
                "id": "uuid",
                "spreadsheet_id": "...",
                "spreadsheet_url": "https://docs.google.com/...",
                "search_params": {"ufs": ["SP"], "setor": "Uniformes"},
                "total_rows": 142,
                "created_at": "2026-02-09T15:30:00Z",
                "last_updated_at": "2026-02-09T15:30:00Z"
            }
        ],
        "total": 1
    }

Example:
    GET /api/export/google-sheets/history?limit=20

post.description:
Handle Stripe webhook events with idempotency and signature validation.

Security:
- Verifies Stripe signature to prevent fake webhooks
- Rejects unsigned/invalid requests with HTTP 400

Idempotency:
- Checks stripe_webhook_events table for duplicate event IDs
- Returns "already_processed" for duplicate webhooks

Processing:
- Determines billing_period from Stripe subscription interval
- Updates user_subscriptions table via Supabase client
- Syncs profiles.plan_type for fallback reliability
- Invalidates Redis cache for affected user
- Stores event in stripe_webhook_events for audit trail

Args:
    request: FastAPI Request object with Stripe event payload

Returns:
    dict: {"status": "success"} or {"status": "already_processed"}

Raises:
    HTTPException 400: Invalid payload or signature verification failed
    HTTPException 500: Database error during processing

get.description:
SSE endpoint for real-time search progress updates.

The client opens this connection simultaneously with POST /buscar,
using the same search_id to correlate progress events.

GTM-GO-002 AC6: Max 3 simultaneous SSE connections per user.

Events:
    - connecting (5%): Initial setup
    - fetching (10-55%): Per-UF progress with uf_index/uf_total
    - filtering (60-70%): Filter application
    - llm (75-90%): LLM summary generation
    - excel (92-98%): Excel report generation
    - complete (100%): Search finished
    - partial_results: Non-terminal — intermediate results during background fetch (A-04)
    - refresh_available (100%): Background fetch complete, new data available (A-04)
    - error: Search failed

GTM-STAB-009 AC3: Enriched status response for polling.

LIGHTWEIGHT (<50ms): Reads from in-memory progress tracker + state machine.
Falls back to DB-based get_search_status only if in-memory state is unavailable.

Called by frontend when SSE disconnects (AC12) or for async polling.
AC7: Return all state transitions for audit trail.

Return results of a background fetch or async search.

A-04 AC5: Called by frontend when user clicks "Atualizar resultados" banner.
GTM-ARCH-001 AC3: Also serves results from ARQ Worker (via Redis).
Returns 404 if search_id not found or expired.

GTM-STAB-009 AC4: Return results of async search.

- 200 with BuscaResponse when results are ready
- 202 with status when still processing
- 404 when search_id not found or expired

post.description:
STORY-364 AC7-AC8: Regenerate Excel from stored results without re-running search.

- 202: Excel generation job enqueued
- 404: Results not found or expired

Main search endpoint — thin wrapper that delegates to SearchPipeline.

GTM-RESILIENCE-A04: Cache-first progressive delivery.
When cache exists for this search, returns cached data immediately with
`live_fetch_in_progress=True` and dispatches background live fetch.
When no cache, runs synchronous pipeline as before (AC10).

The wrapper handles:
- Cache-first check and immediate response (A-04 AC1)
- Background task dispatch (A-04 AC2)
- SSE tracker lifecycle (create, cleanup on error)
- Exception mapping (PNCPRateLimitError → 503, PNCPAPIError → 502, etc.)
- Dependency injection (passing module-level names for test mock compatibility)

STORY-291 AC5: require_active_plan() moved INSIDE try block, AFTER tracker
creation. Previously, when it failed the frontend was left in limbo — POST
failed but SSE was waiting for a tracker that never existed.
CRIT-006 AC4-5: Retry search with only missing/failed UFs.
CRIT-006 AC16-17: Cancel an in-progress search.
Change current user's password.

- Returns "already_processed" for duplicate webhooks

get.description:
API root endpoint - provides navigation to documentation.

SYS-M08: Informs clients about API versioning.

Lightweight liveness + readiness probe for Railway health checks.

SLA-002: ALWAYS returns 200 if the process is running. Railway uses this
as healthcheckPath — returning non-200 or timing out causes Railway to
pull the container from the load balancer ("train not arrived" 404).

The `ready` field indicates whether full initialization completed,
but HTTP 200 is returned regardless to keep the container alive.

Health check endpoint for monitoring and load balancers.

Provides lightweight service health verification including dependency
checks for Supabase, OpenAI, and Redis connectivity.

Health check for all configured procurement data sources.

Returns status, response time, and priority for each source.
Return available procurement sectors for frontend dropdown.
Diagnostic: test if PNCP API is reachable from this server. Admin only.

AlertFilters.title: AlertFilters
AlertFilters.description: Filter criteria that define which bids match this alert.

termos_busca.title: Termos Busca
termos_busca.description: Custom search terms. Use commas to separate multi-word phrases (e.g., 'levantamento topográfico, terraplenagem, drenagem'). Without commas, spaces separate individual keywords (legacy mode).

show_all_matches.title: Show All Matches
show_all_matches.description: When True, bypasses minimum match floor and returns all results with at least 1 keyword match (for 'show hidden results' feature).

exclusion_terms.title: Exclusion Terms
exclusion_terms.description: Custom exclusion terms. Overrides sector exclusions when provided.

modo_busca.title: Modo Busca
modo_busca.description: Modo de busca: 'abertas' (padrão) busca licitações com prazo aberto nos últimos 180 dias; 'publicacao' usa datas enviadas pelo frontend.

status.description: Status da licitação para filtrar. Padrão: 'todos' (sem filtro de status). IMPORTANTE: Filtro de status desabilitado por padrão devido a valores inconsistentes na API PNCP. Use 'todos' para máxima cobertura de resultados.

modalidades.title: Modalidades
modalidades.description: Lista de códigos de modalidade conforme API PNCP. Códigos válidos: 1 (Leilão Eletrônico), 2 (Diálogo Competitivo), 3 (Concurso), 4 (Concorrência Eletrônica), 5 (Concorrência Presencial), 6 (Pregão Eletrônico), 7 (Pregão Presencial), 8 (Dispensa), 10 (Manifestação de Interesse), 11 (Pré-qualificação), 12 (Credenciamento), 13 (Leilão Presencial), 15 (Chamada Pública). None = modalidades padrão [4, 5, 6, 7]. EXCLUÍDOS: 9 (Inexigibilidade) e 14 (Inaplicabilidade) — vencedor pré-definido.

valor_minimo.title: Valor Minimo
valor_minimo.description: Valor mínimo estimado da licitação em BRL. None = sem limite inferior.

valor_maximo.title: Valor Maximo
valor_maximo.description: Valor máximo estimado da licitação em BRL. None = sem limite superior.

esferas.title: Esferas
esferas.description: Lista de esferas governamentais ('F'=Federal, 'E'=Estadual, 'M'=Municipal). None = todas as esferas.

municipios.title: Municipios
municipios.description: Lista de códigos IBGE de municípios para filtrar. None = todos os municípios das UFs selecionadas.

ordenacao.title: Ordenacao
ordenacao.description: Critério de ordenação dos resultados: 'data_desc' (mais recente), 'data_asc' (mais antigo), 'valor_desc' (maior valor), 'valor_asc' (menor valor), 'prazo_asc' (prazo mais próximo), 'relevancia' (score de matching).

orgaos.title: Orgaos
orgaos.description: Lista de nomes de órgãos/entidades para filtrar (busca parcial). None = todos os órgãos.

pagina.title: Pagina
pagina.description: Número da página de resultados (1-indexed). Padrão: 1.

itens_por_pagina.title: Itens Por Pagina
itens_por_pagina.description: Quantidade de itens por página. Valores permitidos: 10, 20, 50, 100. Padrão: 20.

search_id.title: Search Id
search_id.description: Client-generated UUID for SSE progress tracking via /buscar-progress/{search_id}.

check_sanctions.title: Check Sanctions
check_sanctions.description: When true, verify supplier CNPJs against CEIS/CNEP sanctions databases. Adds supplier_sanctions field to each result. Performance impact: ~1s per unique CNPJ.

force_fresh.title: Force Fresh
force_fresh.description: When true, bypass result cache and always query primary sources. Cache write-through still happens on successful results.

BuscaRequest.title: BuscaRequest
BuscaRequest.description:
Request schema for /buscar endpoint.

Validates user input for procurement search:
- At least 1 Brazilian state (UF) must be selected
- Dates must be in YYYY-MM-DD format
- data_inicial must be <= data_final
- Date range cannot exceed 30 days
- data_final cannot be in the future
- valor_maximo must be >= valor_minimo (if both provided)

Examples:
    >>> request = BuscaRequest(
    ...     ufs=["SP", "RJ"],
    ...     data_inicial="2025-01-01",
    ...     data_final="2025-01-31"
    ... )
    >>> request.ufs
    ['SP', 'RJ']

    >>> # With new P0/P1 filters
    >>> request = BuscaRequest(
    ...     ufs=["SP"],
    ...     data_inicial="2025-01-01",
    ...     data_final="2025-01-31",
    ...     status=StatusLicitacao.RECEBENDO_PROPOSTA,
    ...     modalidades=[1, 2, 6],
    ...     valor_minimo=50000,
    ...     valor_maximo=500000,
    ...     esferas=[EsferaGovernamental.MUNICIPAL]
    ... )

resumo.description: Strategic executive summary with actionable recommendations (AI-generated or fallback)

licitacoes.title: Licitacoes
licitacoes.description: List of individual bids for display. FREE tier shows 5-10 fully, rest blurred.

excel_base64.title: Excel Base64
excel_base64.description: Excel file encoded as base64 string (None if plan doesn't allow or storage used)

download_url.title: Download Url
download_url.description: Signed URL for direct Excel download (60min TTL, preferred over base64)

excel_available.title: Excel Available
excel_available.description: Whether Excel export is available for user's plan

quota_used.title: Quota Used
quota_used.description: Monthly searches used after this request

total_raw.title: Total Raw
total_raw.description: Total records fetched from PNCP API (before filtering)

total_filtrado.title: Total Filtrado
total_filtrado.description: Records after applying filters (UF, value, keywords, deadline)

termos_utilizados.title: Termos Utilizados
termos_utilizados.description: Keywords effectively used for filtering (after stopword removal)

stopwords_removidas.title: Stopwords Removidas
stopwords_removidas.description: Stopwords stripped from user input (for transparency)

upgrade_message.title: Upgrade Message
upgrade_message.description: Message shown when Excel is blocked, encouraging upgrade

sources_used.title: Sources Used
sources_used.description: List of source codes that returned data (e.g., ['PNCP', 'PORTAL_COMPRAS'])

source_stats.title: Source Stats
source_stats.description: Per-source fetch metrics when multi-source is active

is_partial.title: Is Partial
is_partial.description: True when not all configured data sources responded successfully (some timed out/failed)

data_sources.title: Data Sources
data_sources.description: Detailed status breakdown of each data source (None for backward compatibility)

degradation_reason.title: Degradation Reason
degradation_reason.description: Human-readable explanation of partial results (e.g., 'PNCP indisponível, resultados de fontes alternativas')

sources_degraded.title: Sources Degraded
sources_degraded.description: CRIT-053: Source codes that are degraded (e.g., canary timeout). Not counted as succeeded.

failed_ufs.title: Failed Ufs
failed_ufs.description: List of UF codes that failed during fetch (timeout or error)

succeeded_ufs.title: Succeeded Ufs
succeeded_ufs.description: List of UF codes that returned data successfully

is_truncated.title: Is Truncated
is_truncated.description: True when at least one UF hit the max_pages limit (data may be incomplete)

truncated_ufs.title: Truncated Ufs
truncated_ufs.description: UF codes where results were truncated due to max_pages limit

truncation_details.title: Truncation Details
truncation_details.description: Per-source truncation flags, e.g. {'pncp': true, 'portal_compras': false}. None when no truncation occurred (backward compatible).

total_ufs_requested.title: Total Ufs Requested
total_ufs_requested.description: Total number of UFs in the original request

cached.title: Cached
cached.description: True when results are served from cache (STORY-257A AC9)

from_cache.title: From Cache
from_cache.description: GTM-INFRA-003 AC6: True when response came 100% from cache (quota was NOT consumed)

cached_at.title: Cached At
cached_at.description: ISO timestamp of when cached results were generated

cached_sources.title: Cached Sources
cached_sources.description: GTM-FIX-010 AC5r: Source codes that contributed to cached data (e.g. ['PNCP','PORTAL_COMPRAS'])

cache_status.title: Cache Status
cache_status.description: UX-303 AC5: Cache freshness status — 'fresh' (0-6h) or 'stale' (6-24h)

cache_level.title: Cache Level
cache_level.description: UX-303 AC2: Which cache level served the data — 'supabase', 'redis', or 'local'

cache_fallback.title: Cache Fallback
cache_fallback.description: STORY-306 AC5: True when serving cached data from a different date range than requested

cache_date_range.title: Cache Date Range
cache_date_range.description: STORY-306 AC5: Date of the cached data when cache_fallback=True (e.g. '2026-02-20')

response_state.title: Response State
response_state.description: Semantic state of the response: 'live' (fresh data), 'cached' (stale cache served), 'degraded' (partial data), 'empty_failure' (all sources failed, no cache), 'degraded_expired' (all sources failed, expired cache >24h served as last resort)

live_fetch_in_progress.title: Live Fetch In Progress
live_fetch_in_progress.description: A-04 AC1: True when cache-first response returned and live fetch is running in background

degradation_guidance.title: Degradation Guidance
degradation_guidance.description: GTM-RESILIENCE-A01: User-facing guidance when response_state is 'empty_failure' or 'degraded'

ufs_status_detail.title: Ufs Status Detail
ufs_status_detail.description: GTM-RESILIENCE-A05 AC2: Per-UF status breakdown with results count

coverage_metadata.description: GTM-RESILIENCE-C03: Consolidated coverage metadata for frontend display

hidden_by_min_match.title: Hidden By Min Match
hidden_by_min_match.description: Number of bids that matched at least 1 term but were below the minimum match floor

filter_relaxed.title: Filter Relaxed
filter_relaxed.description: True if the minimum match filter was relaxed from strict to 1 due to zero results

ultima_atualizacao.title: Ultima Atualizacao
ultima_atualizacao.description: ISO timestamp of when search results were generated

pending_review_count.title: Pending Review Count
pending_review_count.description: STORY-354 AC2: Number of bids awaiting AI reclassification (LLM was temporarily unavailable)

llm_status.title: Llm Status
llm_status.description: LLM summary status: 'ready' (inline), 'processing' (background job running), None (legacy)

excel_status.title: Excel Status
excel_status.description: Excel generation status: 'ready' (inline), 'processing' (background job running), 'skipped' (plan does not allow), 'failed' (job failed), None (legacy)

llm_source.title: Llm Source
llm_source.description: CRIT-005 AC13: Source of the summary — 'ai' (GPT-generated), 'fallback' (heuristic), 'processing' (in progress)

match_relaxed.title: Match Relaxed
match_relaxed.description: STORY-267 AC15: True when min_match_floor was relaxed, enabling 'expanded matching' badge in frontend

filter_summary.title: Filter Summary
filter_summary.description: GTM-STAB-005 AC3: Human-readable filter summary (e.g. '3 rejeitadas por UF, 12 por keyword')

is_simplified.title: Is Simplified
is_simplified.description: GTM-STAB-003 AC4: True when time budget forced simplified (LLM/viability skipped)

relaxation_level.title: Relaxation Level
relaxation_level.description: GTM-STAB-005 AC4: 0=normal, 1=no floor, 2=no density, 3=top by value

paywall_applied.title: Paywall Applied
paywall_applied.description: STORY-320 AC3: True when results were truncated due to trial paywall

total_before_paywall.title: Total Before Paywall
total_before_paywall.description: STORY-320 AC3: Total results before paywall truncation (shown as 'See all N results')

BuscaResponse.title: BuscaResponse
BuscaResponse.description:
Response schema for /buscar endpoint.

Returns the complete search results including:
- AI-generated executive summary
- Excel file as base64-encoded string (optional, based on plan)
- Statistics about raw vs filtered results
- Quota information for user awareness

The Excel file can be decoded and downloaded by the frontend.

reason.title: Reason
reason.description: Cancellation reason: too_expensive, not_using, missing_features, found_alternative, other

ConversationSummary.title: ConversationSummary
ConversationSummary.description: Summary of a conversation for list views.

ufs_processed.title: Ufs Processed
ufs_processed.description: UFs que retornaram dados com sucesso

data_timestamp.title: Data Timestamp
data_timestamp.description: ISO timestamp de quando dados foram obtidos

CreateConversationRequest.title: CreateConversationRequest
CreateConversationRequest.description: Request to create a new conversation with first message.

records.title: Records
records.description: Number of records successfully returned by this source

DataSourceStatus.title: DataSourceStatus
DataSourceStatus.description:
Status information for a single data source in multi-source fetching.

Used to provide transparency about which sources contributed to results
and which failed/timed out during the search operation.

DiagnosticoRequest.title: DiagnosticoRequest
DiagnosticoRequest.description: Request body for PDF diagnostico report generation.

EsferaGovernamental.title: EsferaGovernamental
EsferaGovernamental.description:
Esfera governamental para filtro de busca.

Define o nível de governo do órgão contratante:
- FEDERAL (F): União, ministérios, autarquias federais
- ESTADUAL (E): Estados, DF, secretarias estaduais
- MUNICIPAL (M): Prefeituras, câmaras municipais

FPKeywordSuggestion.description: Keyword appearing frequently in false positives.

FeedbackCategory.description: Category for false positive / false negative feedback.

rejeitadas_min_match.title: Rejeitadas Min Match
rejeitadas_min_match.description: Rejected by minimum match floor (had matches but below threshold)

llm_zero_match_calls.title: Llm Zero Match Calls
llm_zero_match_calls.description: Number of LLM calls for zero-keyword-match bids

llm_zero_match_skipped_short.title: Llm Zero Match Skipped Short
llm_zero_match_skipped_short.description: Zero-match bids skipped due to objeto < 20 chars

zero_match_budget_exceeded.title: Zero Match Budget Exceeded
zero_match_budget_exceeded.description: Zero-match bids deferred due to time budget

zero_match_cap_value.title: Zero Match Cap Value
zero_match_cap_value.description: Cap value applied to zero-match pool

cnae.title: Cnae
cnae.description: CNAE code or business segment text

faixa_valor_min.title: Faixa Valor Min
faixa_valor_min.description: Min contract value in BRL (not cents)

faixa_valor_max.description: Max contract value in BRL (not cents)

FirstAnalysisRequest.description: Request for automatic first analysis after onboarding (GTM-004 AC1).

search_id.title: Search Id

setor_id.title: Setor Id

FirstAnalysisResponse.description: Response from first analysis endpoint (GTM-004 AC3).

total.description: Total number of exports in history

Supports both "create new spreadsheet" and "update existing" modes.

spreadsheet_url.description: Full shareable URL to the spreadsheet

GoogleSheetsExportResponse.title: GoogleSheetsExportResponse
GoogleSheetsExportResponse.description: Response schema for successful Google Sheets export.

queue.title: Queue
queue.description: GTM-RESILIENCE-F01 AC4: ARQ job queue status — 'healthy' or 'unavailable'

valor.title: Valor
valor.description: Estimated total value in BRL. Null when source does not provide value data (e.g., PCP v2).

dias_restantes.title: Dias Restantes
dias_restantes.description: Days remaining until proposal deadline (negative if past)

urgencia.title: Urgencia
urgencia.description: Urgency level: critica (<7d), alta (7-14d), media (14-30d), baixa (>30d), encerrada (past)

link.title: Link
link.description: Direct link to bid source (priority: linkSistemaOrigem > constructed PNCP URL). Null when no link available (UX-400 AC2).

numero_compra.title: Numero Compra
numero_compra.description: Procurement number (e.g., edital number). UX-400 AC5.

cnpj_orgao.title: Cnpj Orgao
cnpj_orgao.description: CNPJ of the issuing government agency. UX-400 AC6.

relevance_score.title: Relevance Score
relevance_score.description: Relevance score 0.0-1.0 (only when custom terms active)

matched_terms.title: Matched Terms
matched_terms.description: List of search terms that matched this bid

supplier_sanctions.description: Sanctions check result (only when check_sanctions=true in request)

relevance_source.title: Relevance Source
relevance_source.description: How relevance was determined: 'keyword' (density >5%), 'llm_standard' (2-5%), 'llm_conservative' (1-2%), 'llm_zero_match' (0% keyword match, LLM classified)

confidence_score.title: Confidence Score
confidence_score.description: Classification confidence 0-100%. keyword=95, llm=varies, item_inspection=85, zero_match<=70

llm_evidence.title: Llm Evidence
llm_evidence.description: Literal text excerpts from procurement description that support the classification (max 3)

confidence.title: Confidence
confidence.description: Confidence level derived from relevance_source: keyword=high, llm_standard=medium, llm_conservative/llm_zero_match=low

viability_score.title: Viability Score
viability_score.description: Viability score 0-100 based on modalidade, timeline, value fit, and geography

viability_factors.title: Viability Factors
viability_factors.description: Breakdown of viability factors: modalidade, timeline, value_fit, geography (each 0-100 with label)

_value_source.title: Value Source
_value_source.description: Whether the bid's estimated value was reported ('estimated') or missing ('missing')

Individual bid item for display in search results.

Used for FREE tier preview feature - shows 5-10 items fully,
rest are displayed blurred/partial without links.

MessageResponse.description: Single message in a conversation thread.

objetivo_principal.description: User's primary objective in free text

completed.description: Whether onboarding wizard has been completed

PipelineItemCreate.description: Request to add an item to the pipeline.

PipelineItemUpdate.description: Request to update a pipeline item (stage and/or notes).

Complete plan details for frontend display.

STORY-210 AC11: Stripe Price IDs removed from public response
to prevent enumeration attacks on pricing infrastructure.

oportunidade.title: Oportunidade
examples: Prefeitura de Porto Alegre - Uniformes Escolares

urgencia.title: Urgencia
urgencia.description: Urgency level: alta (<3 days), media (3-7 days), baixa (>7 days)

acao_sugerida.title: Acao Sugerida
examples: Prepare documentação até 17/02. Prazo final para propostas em 3 dias.

justificativa.title: Justificativa
examples: Valor compatível com seu porte, órgão federal com bom histórico de pagamento.

Recomendacao.title: Recomendacao
Recomendacao.description:
Actionable recommendation for a specific procurement opportunity.

Generated by the LLM consultant or heuristic fallback.
Each recommendation includes a concrete action and justification.

message.title: Message
message.default: Salve estes códigos em local seguro. Cada código só pode ser usado uma vez.

message.title: Message
message.default: Novos códigos gerados. Os códigos anteriores foram invalidados.

ReplyRequest.title: ReplyRequest
ReplyRequest.description: Request to reply to a conversation.

resumo_executivo.title: Resumo Executivo
examples: Encontradas 15 licitações de uniformes em SP e RJ, totalizando R$ 2.3M.

valor_total.title: Valor Total
valor_total.description: Total value of all opportunities in BRL

alerta_urgencia.title: Alerta Urgencia
alerta_urgencia.description: Optional urgency alert for time-sensitive opportunities

recomendacoes.title: Recomendacoes
recomendacoes.description: Prioritized list of recommended opportunities with concrete actions

alertas_urgencia.title: Alertas Urgencia
alertas_urgencia.description: Multiple urgency alerts for time-sensitive opportunities

insight_setorial.title: Insight Setorial
insight_setorial.description: Sector-level market context and trend insight
examples: Este mês há 20% mais oportunidades de vestuário que o mês anterior no RS.

ResumoEstrategico.title: ResumoEstrategico
ResumoEstrategico.description:
Strategic executive summary with actionable recommendations.

Extends ResumoLicitacoes for backward compatibility — all original fields
(resumo_executivo, total_oportunidades, valor_total, destaques, alerta_urgencia)
remain present. New fields provide actionable intelligence.

Fields:
    recomendacoes: Prioritized list of recommended opportunities with actions
    alertas_urgencia: Multiple urgency alerts (replaces single alerta_urgencia)
    insight_setorial: Sector-level market context and trends

alertas_urgencia: ⚠️ 2 licitações encerram em 48h — ação imediata necessária
📋 Edital de SP exige certidão FGTS atualizada (verificar validade)
example.insight_setorial: O setor de vestuário apresenta 15 oportunidades esta semana, 25% acima da média mensal. Concentração em SP e RJ sugere demanda sazonal por uniformes escolares.

recomendacoes.acao_sugerida: Prepare documentação até 16/02. Exige certidão negativa atualizada.
recomendacoes.justificativa: Maior valor do lote, órgão municipal com bom histórico de pagamento.
recomendacoes.oportunidade: Prefeitura de São Paulo - Uniformes Escolares

example.resumo_executivo: Encontradas 15 licitações de vestuário em SP e RJ, totalizando R$ 2.3M. Recomendamos atenção imediata a 3 oportunidades com prazo curto.

is_clean.title: Is Clean
is_clean.description: True if no active sanctions found

SanctionsSummarySchema.title: SanctionsSummarySchema
SanctionsSummarySchema.description:
Lightweight sanctions summary for search result enrichment (STORY-256 AC11).

Shown as a badge on each search result when check_sanctions=true.

results_count.title: Results Count
results_count.description: Number of filtered results so far

results_url.title: Results Url
results_url.description: URL to fetch full results (set when completed)

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: ISO timestamp when search was created

excel_url.title: Excel Url
excel_url.description: Signed URL for Excel download (set when ready)

excel_status.title: Excel Status
excel_status.description: Excel generation status: processing, ready, failed, skipped

SearchStatusResponse.title: SearchStatusResponse
SearchStatusResponse.description:
GTM-STAB-009 AC3: Enriched status response for /v1/search/{id}/status.

Populated from in-memory progress tracker + state machine (lightweight, <50ms).
No database queries — reads only from in-memory state.

STORY-364 AC1: Includes excel_url and excel_status for polling fallback.

StatusLicitacao.title: StatusLicitacao
StatusLicitacao.description:
Status da licitação para filtro de busca.

Define o estágio atual do processo licitatório:
- RECEBENDO_PROPOSTA: Licitações abertas para envio de propostas (padrão)
- EM_JULGAMENTO: Propostas encerradas, em análise pelo órgão
- ENCERRADA: Processo finalizado (com ou sem vencedor)
- TODOS: Sem filtro de status (retorna todas)

SuccessResponse.title: SuccessResponse
SuccessResponse.description: Generic success response for simple operations.

steps_seen.title: Steps Seen
steps_seen.description: Number of steps the user saw before event

TourEventRequest.title: TourEventRequest
TourEventRequest.description: Request for onboarding tour event tracking (STORY-313 AC18).

results_count.title: Results Count
results_count.description: Number of results from this UF

UfStatusDetail.title: UfStatusDetail
UfStatusDetail.description: Per-UF status detail for coverage indicators (GTM-RESILIENCE-A05 AC2).

UnreadCountResponse.title: UnreadCountResponse
UnreadCountResponse.description: Unread message count for badge display.

UpdateBillingPeriodRequest.title: UpdateBillingPeriodRequest
UpdateBillingPeriodRequest.description: Request to update subscription billing period.

UpdateConversationStatusRequest.title: UpdateConversationStatusRequest
UpdateConversationStatusRequest.description: Request to update conversation status (admin only).

UpdateCreditsRequest.title: UpdateCreditsRequest
UpdateCreditsRequest.description: Request body for manual credit adjustment.

quota_reset_date.title: Quota Reset Date
quota_reset_date.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of next quota reset

trial_expires_at.title: Trial Expires At
trial_expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when trial expires (if applicable)

dunning_phase.title: Dunning Phase
dunning_phase.description: STORY-309: Dunning phase — healthy, active_retries, grace_period, blocked

days_since_failure.title: Days Since Failure
days_since_failure.description: STORY-309: Days since first payment failure (null if no failure)

UserProfileResponse.title: UserProfileResponse
UserProfileResponse.description:
User profile with plan capabilities and quota status.

Returned by /api/me endpoint to provide frontend with all
necessary plan information for UI rendering.
